title: pilosella anchusoides subsp. polakiana
intro: Pilosella anchusoides subsp. polakiana is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Pilosella anchusoides plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing pain, inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Pilosella anchusoides subsp. polakiana is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
